devnet_3_progress.highlight: Devnet-3 matrix PR merged; payload and gossip signatures updated
Checkpoint sync issues in long-running devnets resolved
Attestation subnet committee metrics added per request
Sync stalls debugged and fixed; ongoing Devnet-3 stability work

devnet_4_updates.highlight: Key separation PR (attestation/proposal) merging today or tomorrow
Devnet-4 interop ready by end of week pending LeanSig crypto

testing_and_tooling.highlight: Automated interop testing framework shared in tooling chat
Framework supports fast multi-client combinations (e.g., Nimbus-Erigon)

action_items.action: Review and contribute to spec test vector fixes

targets.target: End of week - Devnet-4 interop ready (pending cryptography)
